scripts.studio: npm run assets && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.still: npm run assets && remotion still src/index.ts MachineLabAnnouncement out/frame.png --frame=450 --image-format=png
scripts.render: npm run assets && remotion render src/index.ts MachineLabAnnouncement ../../docs/assets/demo/machine-lab-demo.mp4 --codec=h264 --audio-codec=aac --crf=18
